style: Dark Romantic Victorian Gothic - Alice Liddell
description: High-fidelity PBR materials and embroidery presets matching the detailed construction sheets for Alice Liddell (Faca de Cozinha). Optimized for Stellar Blade-level quality with micro-details, sheen, and realistic fabric behavior.

inner_cream_cotton_lace.notes: Lightweight cotton/linen blend with delicate antique lace trim. Soft sheen and subtle weave.

corset_navy_leather_brass.notes: Structured cotton coutil + vegetable-tanned leather straps. Antique brass hardware with aged patina.

overskirt_navy_jacquard_gold.notes: Navy-black jacquard with subtle floral/scroll woven pattern + gold metallic thread embroidery. Deep red rose appliqués.

lace_trim_antique.notes: Delicate antique cotton lace with scalloped edges. Semi-transparent with fine thread detail.

leather_bracers_victorian.notes: Premium black leather with antique brass studs, rose medallions and filigree.

antique_brass_hardware.notes: Aged antique brass with brushed and engraved details. Slight green oxidation in recesses.

deep_red_rose_applique.notes: Hand-layered deep red satin/organza rose with gold metallic thread accents. Soft petal volume.

garnet_glass_pendant.notes: Dark garnet glass with high refraction and internal sparkle. Antique brass setting.

victorian_leather_boots.notes: Heavy black leather with aged finish, antique brass eyelets and buckles. Subtle natural sheen.

gold_metallic_scroll_floral.notes: Gold metallic thread embroidery with rose and filigree motifs. Raised effect.

deep_red_rose_applique_layered.notes: Hand-layered deep red rose with gold thread outline and center detail.

antique_lace_scrolled_edge.notes: Fine antique lace with delicate scalloped edge and small floral motifs.

recommended_shader_nodes.metal_antique: Principled BSDF + Metallic + Clearcoat + Normal + Slight Subsurface
recommended_shader_nodes.glass_garnet: Principled BSDF + Transmission + IOR + Clearcoat + Normal
